faq.subtitle: FAQ
faq.title: Answers to common questions before we get started.
faq.description: If you need something more specific, our team can tailor the engagement to your business goals.

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We work with service businesses, SaaS brands, e-commerce companies, local brands, and startups that want measurable digital growth.

items.question: How quickly can you launch a project?
items.answer: Most projects begin within a few days, and campaign or landing page launches typically happen within one to three weeks depending on scope.

items.question: Can you customize the pricing plans?
items.answer: Yes. The listed packages are starting points. We also build custom retainers and project scopes based on your needs.

items.question: Is the website content editable?
items.answer: Yes. This build is driven by JSON files, so text, services, branding, testimonials, and pricing can be updated without rewriting the structure.
